name: samarth-dental-monorepo
description: Samarth Dental Care — Next.js + Express + PostgreSQL + Prisma

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
